query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as duplicate_groups
FROM (
  SELECT gameDate, awayTeam, homeTeam, COUNT(*) as cnt
  FROM games
  GROUP BY gameDate, awayTeam, homeTeam
  HAVING cnt > 1
) sub;
